    G

    GAME - Enum constant in enum class scorefour.common.GameState
     
    GAME - Static variable in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    The index of the game song.
    GameController - Class in scorefour.controller
    GameController manages the play state interactions, updates, drawing, and user input handling.
    GameController(GameView, AudioController) - Constructor for class scorefour.controller.GameController
    Constructs a GameController object with the given GameView.
    GameManager - Class in scorefour.controller
    A GameManager handles the game moves, scoreboard, and win checks.
    GameManager(Board, Player, Player, AudioController) - Constructor for class scorefour.controller.GameManager
    Constructs a GameManager to handle the game logic.
    GameMode - Interface in scorefour.common
    A GameMode allows a program to be run in various ways.
    GameState - Enum Class in scorefour.common
    GameState allows the game to gracefully switch between various modes.
    GameView - Class in scorefour.view
    GameView initializes fixed in-game visuals and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.
    GameView() - Constructor for class scorefour.view.GameView
    Constructs a GameView which initializes a background image.
    getAudioController() - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameController
     
    getAudioController() - Method in class scorefour.controller.MenuController

    Gets an array of all the Bead's on the Peg.

    getColour() - Method in class scorefour.model.Bead
    Returns the BeadColour of the Bead.
    getColour() - Method in class scorefour.player.Player
    Returns the Player's bead colour.
    getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class scorefour.controller.GameManager
    Returns the current Player.
    getGameController() - Method in class scorefour.controller.ProgramController
    The GameController handles all interactions, visuals, and logic of the games GAME state.

    getMenuController() - Method in class scorefour.controller.ProgramController
    The MenuController handles all interactions, visuals, and logic of the games MENU state.
    getMove() - Method in class scorefour.player.ComputerPlayer
    Returns the best move the ComputerPlayer generates.
    GetMoveCommand - Class in scorefour.commands
    The GetMoveCommand allows the user to have the program propose a move.

    Returns the programs Panel.

    Returns an array of all Peg's on the Board.
